tasks.subject: Task 0: Workspace shell
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make `mcp/` a published-but-empty workspace package wired to the repo root; confirm the `@livefolio/yfinance` adapter import resolves.

**Files:** root `package.json` (add `mcp` to workspaces), `mcp/package.json`, `mcp/tsconfig.json`, `mcp/tsup.config.ts` (shebang banner), `mcp/vitest.config.ts`, `mcp/README.md` (stub), `mcp/src/index.ts` (placeholder).

**Verify:** `npm install && npm run build --workspace @livefolio/yfinance && node --input-type=module -e "import('@livefolio/yfinance').then(m=>{const miss=['fetchYahooBars','fetchYahooQuoteForAsset','fetchYahooQuoteBatchForAssets','assetToYahooSymbol'].filter(k=>typeof m[k]!=='function');if(miss.length){process.exit(1)}console.log('adapter OK')})" && npm run build --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp && head -1 mcp/dist/index.js && npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp && npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json","mcp/package.json","mcp/tsconfig.json","mcp/tsup.config.ts","mcp/vitest.config.ts","mcp/README.md","mcp/src/index.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm install && npm run build --workspace @livefolio/yfinance && npm run build --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp && npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp && npm test","acceptanceCriteria":["workspace symlink created","adapter import OK","mcp build emits shebang bin","mcp test exits 0","root test still green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: format.ts pure output shapers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure `Quote`/`Bar[]` → output-shape + summary functions (no MCP, no adapter, no I/O). TDD first.

**Files:** Create `mcp/src/format.ts`, `mcp/src/format.test.ts`.

**Verify:** `npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp`

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp/src/format.ts","mcp/src/format.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp","acceptanceCriteria":["quoteToOutput omits absent optionals","barsToOutput compact rows + count","barsSummary empty vs non-empty","tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Server harness + get_quote
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `createServer(deps?)` with the injectable `ServerDeps` seam + register `get_quote`. Prove request/response via `InMemoryTransport`, including read-only annotations on discovery.

**Files:** Create `mcp/src/deps.ts`, `mcp/src/server.ts`, `mcp/src/tools/quote.ts` (get_quote only), `mcp/src/server.test.ts`.

**Verify:** `npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp`

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp/src/deps.ts","mcp/src/server.ts","mcp/src/tools/quote.ts","mcp/src/server.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp","acceptanceCriteria":["get_quote listed read-only/open-world","structuredContent + summary","asset symbol verbatim","empty rejected; adapter throw → isError","tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: get_quotes batch tool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add batch `get_quotes` to `tools/quote.ts`. One round-trip; preserves input order; any unknown symbol fails the whole call.

**Files:** Modify `mcp/src/tools/quote.ts`; add tests to `mcp/src/server.test.ts`.

**Verify:** `npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp`

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp/src/tools/quote.ts","mcp/src/server.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp","acceptanceCriteria":["get_quotes listed read-only","order preserved","assets in order to batch fetcher","adapter throw → isError; blank rejected","tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: get_daily_bars tool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `get_daily_bars` with YYYY-MM-DD parse/validation, symbol normalization via `assetToYahooSymbol`, `includeIncompleteToday` passthrough. Empty range is non-error.

**Files:** Create `mcp/src/tools/bars.ts`; modify `mcp/src/server.ts` (register); add tests to `mcp/src/server.test.ts`.

**Verify:** `npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp`

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp/src/tools/bars.ts","mcp/src/server.ts","mcp/src/server.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp","acceptanceCriteria":["get_daily_bars listed read-only","compact rows + count + echo","symbol normalized + UTC-midnight range","includeIncompleteToday default false/forwarded","bad dates/from>to isError; empty non-error","tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Bin entrypoint, smoke test, README
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace placeholder `index.ts` with the real stdio entrypoint (transport + stderr-only crash handlers), prove the built binary speaks MCP over stdio, write the user-facing README.

**Files:** Modify `mcp/src/index.ts`, `mcp/README.md`; create `mcp/src/smoke.test.ts`.

**Verify:** `npm run build --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp && npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp && npm test`

```json:metadata
{"files":["mcp/src/index.ts","mcp/src/smoke.test.ts","mcp/README.md"],"verifyCommand":"npm run build --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp && npm test --workspace @livefolio/yfinance-mcp && npm test","acceptanceCriteria":["stdio transport, stderr-only","crash handlers exit non-zero","smoke test lists 3 tools","build+test green; root unaffected","README documents tools + claude mcp add"]}
```
